scripts.lint: bun run app:lint && bun run backend:lint && bun run contracts:lint && bun run frontend:lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run contracts:typecheck && bun run backend:typecheck && bun run scraper:typecheck && cd plassy-frontend && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: bun run app:test && bun run backend:test
scripts.app:prebuild: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 cd plassy-app && bunx expo prebuild
scripts.app:prebuild:clean: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 cd plassy-app && bunx expo prebuild --clean
scripts.app:ios:pods: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 bash -lc 'cd plassy-app/ios && pod install' && node plassy-app/scripts/sync-ios-share-extension-build-number.js
scripts.app:build:android:eas:dev:device:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.app:build:android:eas:dev:device:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile development --platform android --local
scripts.app:build:android:eas:preview:device:clo: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.app:build:android:eas:preview:device:loc: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile preview --platform android --local
scripts.app:build:android:eas:prod:device:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.app:build:android:eas:prod:device:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform android --local
scripts.app:build:android:eas:prod:playstore:clo: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform android --auto-submit
scripts.app:build:android:eas:prod:playstore:loc: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform android --local --auto-submit
scripts.app:build:android:expo:prod:device: cd plassy-app && bunx expo run:android --variant release --device
scripts.app:build:android:expo:prod:sim: cd plassy-app && bunx expo run:android --variant release
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:dev:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:dev:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile development --platform ios --local
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:dev:sim:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile development-simulator --platform ios
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:dev:sim:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile development-simulator --platform ios --local
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:preview:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:preview:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile preview --platform ios --local
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:prod:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:prod:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform ios --local
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:prod:auto-submit:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform ios --auto-submit
scripts.app:build:ios:eas:prod:auto-submit:local: cd plassy-app && eas build --profile production --platform ios --local --auto-submit
scripts.app:build:ios:expo:prod:device: cd plassy-app && bunx expo run:ios --configuration Release --device
scripts.app:build:ios:expo:prod:sim: cd plassy-app && bunx expo run:ios --configuration Release
scripts.app:submit:ios:eas:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas submit --platform ios --profile production --latest
scripts.app:submit:ios:eas:local: cd plassy-app && eas submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.app:submit:android:eas:cloud: cd plassy-app && eas submit --platform android --profile production --latest
scripts.app:submit:android:eas:local: cd plassy-app && eas submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.backend:build: cd plassy-backend && bunx prisma generate && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.backend:db:migrate: cd plassy-backend && bunx prisma migrate dev
scripts.backend:db:push: cd plassy-backend && bunx prisma db push
scripts.sonar:all: bun run sonar:plassy-app && bun run sonar:plassy-backend && bun run sonar:plassy-contracts && bun run sonar:plassy-frontend
